headline: How The Investment Story For Blackbaud (BLKB) Is Shifting As Street Targets Reset
summary: The blended fair value target for Blackbaud sits at US$59.80, with no change in the headline price level even as some firms have trimmed individual targets by roughly US$20 to US$25. Analysts are using this latest round of target resets to align their models with updated information, splitting between those who see the revisions as a clean recalibration and those who view them as a warning flag on earlier optimism. As you read on, you will see ways to interpret these shifting targets and to...
